step_rationale: Oxidatively modified LDL; drives atherogenic lesion formation and immune activation.
mechanism: Malondialdehyde-modified LDL is an oxidized ApoB-lipoprotein derivative driving plaque lipid-core accumulation and inflammatory macrophage recruitment.

references.title: We Must Abandon the Myth: Oxidized Low-density Lipoprotein is not a Lipoprotein that Plays a Key Role in Atherogenesis.
Atherogenic Lipoproteins for the Statin Residual Cardiovascular Disease Risk.
